mapper.select:
SELECT CODH.GATE_CD ,CODH.LANG_CD ,CODH.CODE_TYPE ,CODH.CODE_TYPE_DESC ,CODH.DETAIL_DESC ,CODH.CODE_TYPE_RMK ,CODH.USE_FLAG ,COUNT(CODD.CODE) AS DETAIL_CNT FROM STOCCODH CODH LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCCODD CODD ON (CODH.GATE_CD = CODD.GATE_CD AND CODH.CODE_TYPE = CODD.CODE_TYPE AND CODH.LANG_CD = CODD.LANG_CD AND CODD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE CODH.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CODH.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND CODH.LANG_CD = #{LANG_CD}
AND CODH.CODE_TYPE LIKE '%' #{CODE_TYPE} '%'
AND CODH.CODE_TYPE_DESC LIKE '%' #{CODE_DESC} '%'
GROUP BY CODH.GATE_CD, CODH.LANG_CD, CODH.CODE_TYPE, CODH.CODE_TYPE_DESC, CODH.DETAIL_DESC, CODH.CODE_TYPE_RMK, CODH.USE_FLAG ORDER BY CODE_TYPE

SELECT GATE_CD ,LANG_CD ,CODE_TYPE ,CODE ,CODE_DESC ,TEXT1 ,TEXT2 ,TEXT3 ,TEXT4 ,FLAG ,SORT_SQ ,USE_FLAG ,'U' AS DB_FLAG FROM STOCCODD WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND CODE_TYPE LIKE '%'#{CODE_TYPE_DT}'%'
AND CODE LIKE '%'#{CODE_DT}'%'
AND (CODE, ' ')
(CODE_DESC, ' ')
(TEXT1, ' ')
(TEXT2, ' ')
(TEXT3, ' ')
(TEXT4, ' ') LIKE '%'#{CODE_DESC_DT}'%'
AND LANG_CD = #{LANG_CD_DT}
ORDER BY SORT_SQ, UPPER(CODE)

SELECT
'NH'(SF_LPAD((MAX(REGEXP_REPLACE(CODE_TYPE, '[^0-9]', '')), '0000')+1, 4, '0') )
'NH' + ((SF_LPAD((MAX(CONVERT(INTEGER, SF_SUBSTR(CODE_TYPE,2,SF_LENGTH(CODE_TYPE))))+1),3,'0') ),'001')
FROM STOCCODH WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CODE_TYPE LIKE 'NH%'

SELECT CODD.CODE ,CODD.CODE_DESC FROM STOCCODH CODH LEFT JOIN STOCCODD CODD ON (CODH.GATE_CD = CODD.GATE_CD AND CODH.CODE_TYPE = CODD.CODE_TYPE AND CODH.LANG_CD = CODD.LANG_CD) WHERE CODH.GATE_CD = (#{ses.gateCd}, 'SYSTEM') AND CODH.CODE_TYPE = #{CODE_TYPE} AND CODH.LANG_CD = (#{LANG_CODE}, 'KO') AND CODD.USE_FLAG = '1' AND CODH.USE_FLAG = '1' AND CODD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND CODH.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY
TO_NUMBER(CODD.SORT_SQ)
CAST(CODD.SORT_SQ AS INT)
, UPPER(CODD.CODE_DESC)
